name: Fort Worth Independent School District
about: Fort Worth Independent School District serves approximately 73,000 students in Fort Worth and surrounding communities in Tarrant County, Texas.
calendarNotes: Fort Worth ISD follows the Texas academic calendar, typically opening in early August. Spring Break falls in mid-March, generally aligned with Dallas ISD across the metro. Fort Worth is close enough to Dallas that families with connections to both districts may notice their break dates are within a day or two of each other — useful for coordinating family visits. The district has expanded its early college high school and career and technical education programs, which follow the standard academic calendar but may have additional required testing days. Families new to Fort Worth from out of state should plan for the significantly earlier school year start compared to most Northern and Western states.
